Container.Name: SimpleLogin-AIO
Container.Overview: SimpleLogin: Self-hosted email alias service. This AIO version bundles the Web, API, and Worker into one container using s6-overlay.

Config.Name: Web Port
Config.Description: TIER 1: SimpleLogin Web/API port. Access the UI here.

Config.Name: App URL
Config.Description: TIER 1: The full URL where SimpleLogin is hosted (e.g., https://app.yourdomain.com).

Config.Name: Email Domain
Config.Description: TIER 1: Your primary email alias domain (e.g., yourdomain.com).

Config.Name: Flask Secret
Config.Description: TIER 1: Random string for session encryption. Generate with 'openssl rand -hex 32'.

Config.Name: Timezone
Config.Description: TIER 1: Your local timezone. Example: America/Denver.

Config.Name: DB URI
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - PostgreSQL connection string. Recommended: Use postgres-shared.

Config.Name: Redis URL
Config.Description: TIER 2: Standard Mode - Redis connection string. Recommended: Use redis-shared.

Config.Name: Admin Email
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Default admin email address.

Config.Name: Support Email
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Support email shown in UI.

Config.Name: Disable Registration
Config.Description: TIER 3: Power Mode - Set to true to close public registration.
